title: lupinus barbatus
intro: Lupinus barbatus, also known as the Yellow or Barbatus Lupin, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lupinus barbatus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant protection. Lupinus barbatus is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and can be found in some health food stores and online supplement retailers.
